home.hero.subtitle: Everything you need to start a modern web project — architecture, auth, theming, i18n, state management and more. All wired up and ready to go.
home.features.title: What's included
home.features.stack.title: Fast & Modern Stack
home.features.stack.desc: Built on React 19, Vite 7 and TypeScript. Instant hot-reload and optimized production builds out of the box.
home.features.architecture.title: Scalable Architecture
home.features.architecture.desc: Feature-Sliced Design keeps your codebase clean as it grows. Every layer knows its responsibilities.
home.features.auth.title: Auth & Access Control
home.features.auth.desc: Cookie-based authentication with role-based route guards. Protect pages with a single prop.
home.features.theming.title: Theming & i18n
home.features.theming.desc: Light and dark themes plus multi-language support (RU / KK / EN) ready from day one.
home.features.state.title: Global State
home.features.state.desc: Zustand stores for notifications and any future state. No Provider boilerplate required.
home.features.errors.title: Error Handling
home.features.errors.desc: Error Boundary catches runtime errors and shows a friendly fallback instead of a blank screen.
about.hero.subtitle: We are a small team of passionate engineers and designers on a mission to make modern web development faster, simpler and more enjoyable for everyone.
about.mission.title: Our mission
about.mission.text: To provide developers with a production-ready foundation so they can focus on building features that matter — not on setting up boilerplate. We obsess over architecture, developer experience and code quality so you don't have to.
about.values.title: Our values
about.values.innovation.title: Innovation
about.values.innovation.desc: We embrace new ideas and modern technologies to solve real problems.
about.values.collaboration.title: Collaboration
about.values.collaboration.desc: Great products are built by great teams. We believe in open communication.
about.values.quality.title: Quality
about.values.quality.desc: We take pride in every detail — from code architecture to user experience.
about.team.title: Meet the team
